form.formComment: Last start won by a nose at Turffontein Standside March 21 over 1600m defeating Too Late My Mate carrying 57kg at $13.50. The start before that 6th of 9 at Turffontein Standside on March 7 over 1400m, 4 len behind Pretty Persuasive with 54.5kg at $15. Determined winner last time on the Standside track. Has three wins here. Hard to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Last start won by a nose at Turffontein Standside March 21 over 1600m defeating Too Late My Mate carrying 57kg at $13.50. The start before that 6th of 9 at Turffontein Standside on March 7 over 1400m, 4 len behind Pretty Persuasive with 54.5kg at $15. Determined winner last time on the Standside track. Has three wins here. Hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 8 at this track on March 12 over 1450m, slow going 3.5 len behind Tintin with 52.5kg at $26. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Vaal on September 11 over 1450m, 2.25 len behind Fire In Her Soul carrying 57kg at $17. Loves the course and distance, Solid return and gets chance to break through.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Second run back. First-up after three months 4th of 8 at this track on March 12 over 1450m, slow going 3.5 len behind Tintin with 52.5kg at $26. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Vaal on September 11 over 1450m, 2.25 len behind Fire In Her Soul carrying 57kg at $17. Loves the course and distance, Solid return and gets chance to break through.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At approximately the 1200m, carried outwards by Back From War.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 53-day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 12 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1600m, 5 len behind Grand Occasion carrying 59.2kg at $15. The start before that 4th of 8 at Turffontein Standside on February 1 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Warning Sound carrying 55kg at $7. Should go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Comes here off a 53-day let-up. At the latest run 9th of 12 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1600m, 5 len behind Grand Occasion carrying 59.2kg at $15. The start before that 4th of 8 at Turffontein Standside on February 1 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Warning Sound carrying 55kg at $7. Should go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the concluding stages, App K J Lihaba briefly dropped his left-side rein.
Shortly after the start, bumped out by Streisand.
Hanging in during the concluding stages.

previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING
W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last campaign winning by long-neck Vaal January 22 over 1450m defeating Lady Elliot carrying 57.5kg at $3.80. On debut sixth of 8 at this track May 8 over 1450m, 7 len behind Back From War carrying 60kg at $67. Finished last campaign with a win this trip. Expect a bold showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last campaign winning by long-neck Vaal January 22 over 1450m defeating Lady Elliot carrying 57.5kg at $3.80. On debut sixth of 8 at this track May 8 over 1450m, 7 len behind Back From War carrying 60kg at $67. Finished last campaign with a win this trip. Expect a bold showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had to check and switch in to avoid the heels of Cape Saffron.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 7th of 10 at Vaal on March 28 over 1700m, 4 len behind Chieftain's Shield carrying 58.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 5th of 8 at Durbanville on January 21 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Midway with 59kg at $8. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Second run back. First-up after two months 7th of 10 at Vaal on March 28 over 1700m, 4 len behind Chieftain's Shield carrying 58.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 5th of 8 at Durbanville on January 21 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Midway with 59kg at $8. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped outwards and made contact with Sansa Stark.
Leaving the 400m, raced green, carried outwards by Without Remorse.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation won by 2.75 len Turffontein Standside December 30 over 1400m defeating The Reason with 59kg at $1.90. When resuming last campaign fourth of 10 at Vaal September 25 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind She's All Mine with 58kg at $8. Solid return wouldn't surprise.
